description_long: This bungalow features a single-story structure with a prominent hip roof and a clean, modern facade. The front entrance is centered, flanked by two large windows, and the house is surrounded by a well-maintained green lawn. On one side, there is a glass greenhouse structure attached, providing additional utility and visual interest. The rear of the bungalow includes a blue accent wall and a garage door, with more windows and a patio area visible. The exterior walls are finished in light gray, and the roof is a darker gray, creating a subtle contrast. The overall design is compact and functional, with clear access points and a blend of traditional and contemporary elements.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a hip roof, light gray walls, and a glass greenhouse extension, surrounded by a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two large windows, and a neatly trimmed lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the hip roof, plain wall, and the attached glass greenhouse structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a blue accent wall, garage door, patio area, and part of the greenhouse.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a plain wall, visible greenhouse, and outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
